name: scico-skills
description: SciCo-Skills — Claude Code skills for scientific research & publication: microbiome (amplicon, shotgun), genomics (isolate genome, strain-typing, AMR), transcriptomics (bulk & meta RNA-seq), publication figures, and an autonomous bioinformatics tool-builder.

plugins.name: scico-skills
plugins.description: A collection of Claude Code skills for scientific research and publication (microbiome, genomics, transcriptomics, figures, tool-building).
